start.speaker: Tomlin
start.text: Welcome, welcome! Finest goods in the valley, I promise you that. Well... the only goods in the valley, but still finest!

offer_help.speaker: Tomlin
offer_help.text: What can I do for you today?

choices.text: I'd like to browse your wares.

open_shop.speaker: Tomlin
open_shop.text: Take a look, take a look!

quest_hint.speaker: Tomlin
quest_hint.text: Actually, yes. I had a supply wagon stolen by goblins near the forest road. Three crates of good stock, gone. If you found them, I'd make it worth your while.

quest_offer.speaker: Tomlin
quest_offer.text: The crates had my mark on them — a blue star. You can't miss them.

farewell.speaker: Tomlin
farewell.text: Safe travels! Come back if you need anything.
